case_title: JOANNE LIN VS. JIAN-MIN FONG et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY LIN, JOANNE AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, JIAN-MIN DELTA DESIGN & ENGINEERING SYSTEM, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, JOANNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DELTA DESIGN & ENGINEERING SYSTEM, INC. DEFENDANT JIAN-MIN FONG DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
